shelf.mod.config.title: Shelf
shelf.mod.config.option.auto_restock.des: Restocks items which is specified in restockable list.
shelf.mod.config.option.fov.desc: The field of view, angular extent of the observable world.
The render distance. If this value is set to high, it impacts performance massively.
shelf.mod.config.option.volume.desc: The master volume of the game.
shelf.mod.config.option.vsync.desc: Vertical synchronization (VSync) is an option in most systems in which the video card is prevented from doing anything visible to the display memory until after the monitor finishes its current refresh cycle.
